diffCoverage.notes: Reconciliation: feature shipped in the multi-account UI merge; contract reworded to match the frontend-managed design, diagnostic added, live switch proof captured.

findings.evidence: The captured live log shows account-switch between 2299... and 1483... with the conversation count changing per account (e.g. -> 1483... conversations=0, -> 2299... conversations=12), proving the active account + its view swap. svelte-check + build are attested; architecture review passes.

summary: account-switcher is honestly done. The account rail + switch is frontend-managed (buckets keyed by accountId; RailNav avatars with active ring + unread badge), which is the implemented design — the originally-planned Rust list_accounts/set_active_account commands were intentionally not built (accounts come from login/restore profiles), and the contract was reworded to match. Live log proves switching swaps the active account + view; build/lint clean. Pass.
